para_trans: GOVERNMENT ORDER NUMBER: SASP 1125 / P.No. 101 / PRASS-1
Madam Cama Marg, Martyrdom Rajguru Chowk,
Regulation of transfers and discharge of government duties of Maharashtra Government employees.
As per Section 4 (4) and 4 (5) of the Prevention of Delay Act, 2005, the following are mentioned:
Inter-Departmental transfers of officers of the Joint Secretary cadre of the Ministry for administrative reasons.
He is being posted in the section shown in column-4 in front of his name: -
2. Smt. Vidya Ramappa Hampiah, Joint Secretary, Posted As Joint Secretary, Urban Development Department
The additional charge is being delegated to the following order.
3. The transferred officers should join the transferred department immediately.
4. General Administration Department, Government Circular No. 25.08.2022
